title: L&D Training Effectiveness Report — AIAgent_05_2026
executiveSummary: The selected scope contains 1 course(s), 1 completed course(s), and 13 trainee-course records. Overall attendance is 90.4%, completion is 100%, pass rate is 92.3%, and average score is 7.88/10. Total training hours are 188 and scaled cost is 9.6. Overall effectiveness classification is Risk.
insights: AI Agent & LLM Application Development has the strongest effectiveness score (89.47) in the selected scope.
2 outstanding trainee(s) meet the star learner rule: score >= 9.0 and full attendance.
1 course group(s) contain learners who need support based on score or attendance policy.
1 high-priority L&D NORM flag(s) were triggered.
recommendations: Flag for coaching; assign buddy or practice resources
Create a coaching plan for support-needed learners and review attendance issues with direct managers.

checklist.detail: Teams, OneDrive, Forms, KPI, Rules and Template sheets were mapped to simulated sources.
Expected attendance rows are trainee count × total sessions. Late is retained for metrics as partial attendance.
Completed courses require one assessment/pass-status row per trainee.
NORM-14 requires at least 60% feedback response rate for valid analysis.

checklist.check: Consistency: course ID, trainee ID, period
checklist.detail: Cross-source course IDs and pass-status logic were checked against the catalog.

normFlags.action: Flag for coaching; assign buddy or practice resources

supportNeededTrainees.reason: Below pass threshold or attendance below 70%
